title: The Last Warrior
overview: Ell the dragon, Lafi the magician, and Dino the baby warrior become an unconventional family.

title: A Special Training for a Warrior
overview: Lafi goes for a job interview, leaving Ell to care for Dino. Ell begins Dino's warrior training.

title: First Day of Work
overview: Lafi works as a healer, restoring the hair of bald mages. Ell meets a Demon Hunter, who helps look after Dino.

title: Grandma Helga
overview: Someone keeps hunting animals and leaving them in front of Ell and Lafi's house every day.

title: Here is the Second of Four Guardians
overview: The Second of Four Guardians pays Ell and Lafi a visit, and has a request.

title: The Warrior's Candidate
overview: Verr searches for a Warrior strong enough to defeat the Demon Lord.

title: The Cottage We Share
overview: Ell's Dad thinks that Ell has started a family, and pays him and Lafi a visit.

title: Warrior's Destiny
overview: Ell, Lafi and Verr prepare for Dino's first birthday party.

title: A Perfect First Birthday Party
overview: On the day of Dino's first birthday party, the weather is terrible. Will anyone show up?

title: Stay-at-Home Dad Depression
overview: Ell has been acting depressed lately, so Lafi and Verr make plans to cheer him up.

title: Avenge
overview: The priests from the Radiant Temple find Ell and Verr, and a battle ensues.
